tasks.subject: Fix Bug #1: < and | in recipe text produce wrong tokens (lex.rs)
tasks.description: Add !self.in_recipe guard to the match arms for '<' and '|' in lex.rs so they are treated as regular Word characters inside recipe text.

tasks.subject: Fix Bug #2: Diamond includes cause duplicate rules (include.rs)
tasks.description: Add a HashSet<PathBuf> to IncludeContext that tracks all files already parsed (not just the current include chain). Before parsing an included file, check if it's already been parsed — skip if so. Add tests for diamond include scenarios.
